title: microseris campestris
intro: Microseris campestris, also known as Camper's false dandelion or western false dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Microseris campestris include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
